notes: Do not publish two pieces from the same `shape_group` on the same day.
Use `shape_group` to vary page shape before you vary wording.
If the queue only offers duplicate `shape_group` options, ship the highest-value one and defer the rest.

shape_groups.goal: Main intent page that explains the product surface directly.
Step-by-step teaching page for a concrete player task.
FAQ-style page or section answering a common player question.
Compare two approaches such as manual replay versus AI analysis.
Review-oriented page for after-session analysis and replay workflows.
Page focused on recording, saving, or structuring live hand notes.
Top-of-funnel discovery page tied to luck, table feel, or pre-session curiosity.
Preparation or planning page for before a live session starts.

preferred_mix.goal: Own durable search intents tied to bankroll, replay, and hand-history workflows.
Support near-page-one queries and reduce ambiguity around free vs premium workflows.
Capture realistic live-poker situations using player language and product-relevant advice.
Publish timely commentary only when the topic materially affects live poker players or connects naturally to the product.

quality_gates: useful body content, not a thin wrapper
internal links to bankroll or hand-review when relevant
no generic news rewrites without analysis
disallowed_patterns: daily forced publishing regardless of topic quality
pages that do not support a real player task
content whose only purpose is to create more URLs
